title: SuperMarioBros-NES Level1-1/Level1-2 mixed-policy high-watermark recipe search

objective.primary_metric_note: Primary metric to maximize during training. It is the bottleneck across the latest available per-source rolling clear rates; use train/info/level_complete/rate/mean/last only as a companion signal or tiebreaker.
objective.success_requirement: Maximize peak train/info/level_complete/rate/min/last. A balanced success requires both seeds in the same batch to each reach that bottleneck metric strictly greater than 0.80 within the 5M-step cap.
objective.attempt_denominator: Per-source rolling 100-attempt windows from train/info/level_complete/from/<prev>/rate. Level1-1 maps to 0-0 and Level1-2 maps to 0-1.
forbidden_stop_rules: Do not early-stop on the first high-watermark crossing; later collapse and recovery can both happen.
Do not use pooled completion or final checkpoint reward as the success metric.

runtime.runtime_image_ref: latest successful digest-pinned GHCR train image from the rlab train image workflow

seed_protocol.same_seed_note: Same seed is a controlled randomization label, not bitwise reproducibility under default CUDA.

cap_policy.increase_rule: Do not increase the cap for this goal.
cap_policy.early_stop_rule: No early stop on train/info/level_complete/rate/min/last or train/info/level_complete/rate/mean/last; train to the cap and select by the peak history.

search_protocol.screen: Launch two-seed recipe batches on beast-3. Advance recipes by peak train/info/level_complete/rate/min/last; use train/info/level_complete/rate/mean/last as a companion signal for ties and diagnostics.
search_protocol.iterate: Change legal recipe levers in small interpretable steps: PPO update pressure, state sampling weights, entropy schedule, value/reward scaling, and true completion reward.
search_protocol.success: Declare the goal satisfied only when the same checked-in spec produces two completed runs whose sampled or raw W&B history proves peak train/info/level_complete/rate/min/last > 0.80 for both seeds.

incumbent.status: near-miss; one seed reached exactly 0.80, but no two-seed batch satisfied >0.80 on both seeds

default_train_profile_note: Queue-backed launches are profileless by default; use the spec run_target plus a digest-pinned runtime image.

execution.manual_trainers: Avoid ad hoc second trainers through sky exec, docker exec, or manual host shells for comparable runs.
execution.backfill_rule: Backfill finished slots while queued recipe batches still have decision value.

notes: This is a discovery goal around the training high-watermark requested by the operator; checkpoint eval remains useful for interpreting candidates but is not the success metric.
Use W&B history, not only run summary, because run summary stores the final value for train/info/level_complete/rate/mean/last and train/info/level_complete/rate/min/last.
